creator: jhein@timing.com
text:
vm-7.19 hasn't been updated in years and vm has a new maintainer...

http://www.nongnu.org/viewmail/
http://www.nongnu.org/viewmail/handing-over-vm.txt

This update also includes a patch that fixes a small quoting
problem not yet fixed upstream.

I'm willing to do the port maintenance.
